summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 0.1% while the S&P 500 was up 0.3% and the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.4%. The tail end of a robust first-quarter earnings season, ongoing artificial intelligence strength, and inflation figures roughly in line with expectations were enough to push equities higher today—familiar trends that have helped push the Nasdaq to its best two-month stretch in decades.
content: The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 0.1% while the S&P 500 was up 0.3% and the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.4%. The tail end of a robust first-quarter earnings season, ongoing artificial intelligence strength, and inflation figures roughly in line with expectations were enough to push equities higher today—familiar trends that have helped push the Nasdaq to its best two-month stretch in decades.
chineseSummary: 道琼斯工业平均指数上涨 0.1%，标准普尔 500 指数上涨 0.3%，纳斯达克综合指数上涨 0.4%。强劲的第一季度财报季的尾声、持续的人工智能实力以及大致符合预期的通胀数据足以推动今天的股市走高——这些熟悉的趋势帮助纳斯达克指数创下了几十年来最好的两个月涨幅。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
